name: Fresh Strawberry Sherbet
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Apple juice concentrate OR: 1/2 cup Water
Fruit and berry concentrate  5 cups Fresh strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash and stem the berries.
2 In a blender or food processor, combine the concentrate, water (or apple juice), and lemon juice.
3 Add half of the berries to the blender and blend until smooth.
4 Add the remaining berries and blend again until smooth.
5 Pour the mixture into a freezer container and freeze.
Exchanges = 3/4 fruit exchange. Per serving = 50 calories, 12.5 grams carbs, no protein or fat.
